subcodes.first_line: O ye flock of the Lord of glory! Blessed are they who have observed the fast during its appointed month
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اغنام حضرت بهاء خوشا بحال نفوسیکه در ماه صیام روزه گرفتند و بکمال اتحاد و اتفاق
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @firmness in the Covenant, @law of fasting, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @universal peace; world unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
